excellent.description: Model saved correctly with joblib/pickle and all preprocessing components included. Can load and make predictions successfully.

good.description: Model saved correctly but minor issues with preprocessing pipeline or file organization.

satisfactory.description: Model saves but incomplete pipeline or inconsistent predictions after loading.

needs_improvement.description: Model doesn't save correctly or fails to load, or preprocessing missing.

excellent.description: Implements complete versioning with metadata (metrics, timestamp, description). Uses semantic versioning correctly.

good.description: Basic versioning implemented with some metadata.

excellent.description: Robust error handling with try-except blocks, meaningful error messages, and graceful degradation.

needs_improvement.description: No error handling or crashes on errors.

excellent.description: Complete model card with performance metrics, usage instructions, and limitations documented.

good.description: Basic documentation present but missing some elements.

excellent.description: Complete Flask API with /predict, /health, and / endpoints. All endpoints work correctly with proper HTTP methods and status codes.

good.description: API works with main endpoints but minor issues or missing health check.

satisfactory.description: Basic API functionality but significant issues or missing features.

needs_improvement.description: API doesn't run or has major functionality issues.

excellent.description: Comprehensive input validation, proper error handling with appropriate HTTP codes (400, 500), and meaningful error messages.

good.description: Basic validation and error handling present.

needs_improvement.description: Minimal validation or crashes on invalid input.

excellent.description: Complete test script that tests all endpoints, error cases, and edge cases. Tests pass successfully.

good.description: Basic tests present covering main functionality.

excellent.description: Complete README with API documentation, usage examples, and setup instructions.

excellent.description: Well-defined Pydantic models with appropriate types and validation rules.

good.description: Pydantic models present but could be more comprehensive.

needs_improvement.description: No Pydantic models or incorrect usage.

excellent.description: Interactive docs work correctly (/docs), tests present.
Clear comparison showing understanding of when to use each.
Model successfully deployed to cloud (Heroku or similar) with working public URL. API accessible and functional.

needs_improvement.description: No successful deployment or major failures.

excellent.description: Proper Procfile, requirements.txt, runtime.txt. Environment variables used correctly.
Deployment tested and documented with URL, setup instructions, and troubleshooting guide.
Comprehensive logging of predictions with timestamp, input, prediction, confidence, and model version.

excellent.description: Complete dashboard showing key metrics: requests over time, prediction distribution, confidence scores. Interactive and updates correctly.
